name: Divine Immolation

spell.name: Divine Immolation

heightened.text: The damage increases by 1d6 and persistent damage increases by 1d6.

spell.success: The creature takes half damage and no persistent damage.
spell.failure: The creature takes full damage and persistent damage.
spell.critical_failure: The creature takes double damage and double persistent damage.

text: Divine flames scour creatures within the area. Creatures take 6d6 fire damage and 2d6 persistent fire damage. The divine power within the flames scorches the spirit as well; a creature takes spirit damage instead of fire damage from divine immolation if that would be more detrimental to the creature (as determined by the GM).
